Battery Pack Expansion
======================

|PRODUCT_NAME| supports expansion with compatible external battery packs.

Connecting Battery Packs
------------------------

1. Ensure the power station is turned off.
2. Connect the battery expansion cable to the expansion port.
3. Secure the connection properly.

Benefits
--------

Adding expansion battery packs can provide:

- Increased energy storage capacity
- Extended operating time
- Improved flexibility for different power demands

.. note::

   Refer to the compatible battery pack models for supported configurations.
